feedback: The mobile app crashes every time I try to upload a photo larger than 5MB. This is really frustrating because I'm a photographer.
Loving the new dashboard! The dark mode is gorgeous. Keep it up.
Pricing page is super confusing. I couldn't tell if the Team plan included SSO. Spent 20 minutes reading and still unclear.
The API rate limits are way too low for what we're paying. We hit the cap in the first hour every day.
Why can't I export reports as PDF? CSV is fine but my CEO wants pretty PDFs and I have to manually screenshot everything.
Onboarding was excellent. The interactive tutorial made it really clear. Best onboarding I've seen in a SaaS tool.
App is unusably slow when I have more than 5000 records. Filtering takes 30+ seconds.
Customer support replied in 12 minutes on a Sunday. Above and beyond. Resolved my issue in one email.
Mobile app crashes constantly. I've reinstalled it 3 times. Considering switching to a competitor.
Pricing in INR would be helpful for our Indian customers. Right now we have to convert everything from USD.
The onboarding email sequence is too aggressive. 6 emails in 3 days felt spammy.
Integrations are limited. We use Linear and Notion and there's no native sync, only Zapier.
The free plan is genuinely useful — I've been a user for 8 months and recommend you to everyone.
SOC 2 compliance docs were impossible to find. Took 3 emails to support to get them.
Slow performance is a dealbreaker. I switch to your competitor after 5pm because their app stays fast.
Pricing in dollars makes the Pro plan feel like a luxury for us. Localized pricing would change my decision.
The new AI features are great but they hallucinate sometimes. Wish they cited sources.
Login with Google was broken yesterday for 3 hours. No status page update. Very stressful during a launch.
The mobile app is buggy. Photos don't upload. Reports don't render. Switched to web only.
Loving the new keyboard shortcuts! Major productivity boost. Power users will love this.
Confusing pricing. I couldn't understand the difference between Team and Pro until I emailed sales.
Need an export-to-Notion button. Right now I copy-paste and it loses formatting.
Your competitor offers SSO on the Team plan. You only offer it on Enterprise. Making us reconsider.
App keeps logging me out every few hours. Annoying when I'm in flow.
The dashboard is beautiful but I can't customize it. I want to hide widgets I don't use.
